notes: Phase 3 complete. Agent runtime: AgentContext type + context assembly module, full error handling with ProviderError catching in ReAct loop, safe JSON.parse for tool args, streaming variant (runSandraAgentStream) with AgentStreamEvent. GitHub indexing: client updated with 404 (null) and 403 (ProviderError) handling, fetchRepoDocuments() for markdown-only fetching, indexer rewritten to take repoId string from DB with syncStatus tracking (indexing→indexed/error), content hash change detection skipping unchanged docs, IndexedSource/IndexedDocument DB record management. DB helpers: createOrUpdateSource, saveIndexedDocuments, deleteDocumentsForSource, getRepoById. 265 tests passing (196 existing + 69 new), tsc clean, ESLint clean.
